description: Detects insecure deserialization in PHP: unserialize() calls with user input or without allowed_classes restriction. JSON version flags all function_call_expression nodes (cannot filter to only unserialize() calls or check argument type without #match? predicate support). Precision reduced per D-07.

flag.message: Function call detected -- verify this is not unserialize() with user input; use json_decode() instead or pass ['allowed_classes' => false] as second argument to restrict object instantiation
